name: Candel Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing off-the-shelf viral immunotherapies that elicit an individualized, systemic anti-tumor immune response to help patients fight cancer.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing off-the-shelf viral immunotherapies that elicit an individualized, systemic anti-tumor immune response to help patients fight cancer.

catalysts.event: Announce updated overall survival data and biomarker analysis from phase 2a NSCLC trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to announce updated data on OS including data on long-term survival and biomarker analysis from the phase 2a clinical trial in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Announce supportive data on prostate cancer-specific outcomes after extended follow-up
catalysts.sentence: We expect to announce supportive data on prostate cancer-specific outcomes (prostate cancer-specific DFS, time to salvage anti-cancer therapy, and time to metastasis) after extended follow-up in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate pivotal phase 3 clinical trial of aglatimagene in NSCLC
catalysts.sentence: Based on these positive findings, we plan to initiate a pivotal phase 3 clinical trial of aglatimagene in patients with progressive, metastatic, non-squamous NSCLC despite ICI treatment in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Present novel immunological biomarker data in localized prostate cancer
catalysts.sentence: In addition, in the third quarter of 2026, we expect to present novel immunological biomarker data in patients with localized prostate cancer.

catalysts.event: Submit BLA for aglatimagene in prostate cancer
catalysts.sentence: We are in ongoing dialogue with the FDA in preparation for the Company's anticipated submission of a Biologics License Application (BLA) for aglatimagene in prostate cancer in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Present mature overall survival data and update on long-term survivors for linoserpaturev arm C
catalysts.sentence: We have recently completed enrollment in arm C, and expect to present mature mOS data and an update on long-term survivors in the fourth quarter of 2026.
